inputs.label: Pet Weight
inputs.businessContext: The weight of the pet in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight of the pet in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gewicht des Haustiers in Kilogramm
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids de l'animal en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso de la mascota en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Activity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for activity level (e.g., 1.2 for sedentary, 1.5 moderate, 1.8 active).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for activity level (e.g., 1.2 for sedentary, 1.5 moderate, 1.8 active).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktivite seviyesi çarpanı (örn. hareketsiz için 1.2, orta için 1.5, aktif için 1.8).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Aktivitätsniveau (z.B. 1,2 für sitzend, 1,5 moderat, 1,8 aktiv)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour le niveau d'activité (ex. : 1,2 pour sédentaire, 1,5 modéré, 1,8 actif).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador por nivel de actividad (ej. 1.2 sedentario, 1.5 moderado, 1.8 activo).

inputs.label: Caloric Density
inputs.businessContext: Energy density of the food in kilocalories per kilogram (common for dry food: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy density of the food in kilocalories per kilogram (common for dry food: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mamanın kilogram başına kilokalori cinsinden enerji yoğunluğu (kuru mama için yaygın: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).
businessContext_i18n.de: Energiedichte des Futters in Kilokalorien pro Kilogramm (üblich für Trockenfutter: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité énergétique de l'aliment en kilocalories par kilogramme (courant pour les aliments secs : 3000-4000 kcal/kg).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad energética del alimento en kilocalorías por kilogramo (común en alimento seco: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).

inputs.label: Meals Per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of meals the pet eats daily.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of meals the pet eats daily.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evcil hayvanın günlük yediği öğün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Mahlzeiten, die das Haustier täglich frisst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de repas que l'animal mange par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de comidas que la mascota consume al día.
